focus_points.label: Principal-level impact and leverage showing up
focus_points.reason: Whether the Principal scope is translating into visible outcomes on this team, or if delivery is steady while impact is still not landing publicly.

focus_points.label: Early expectation alignment for Principal scope
focus_points.reason: Whether he understands what “good” looks like at Principal on this team right now, especially given prior feedback about needing earlier expectation alignment.

focus_points.label: Cross-team trust and hard calls developing
focus_points.reason: What you need to see at Principal level is growing judgment in ambiguous situations and stronger relationships beyond the immediate team.

focus_points.label: Judgment calls on tradeoffs vs safe execution
focus_points.reason: Whether he’s making and escalating the right tradeoffs for Principal scope, or staying in safe execution mode by asking fewer questions and waiting for direction.
